caseStudies.title: Time Heist
caseStudies.outcome: A bank vault heist room with working safe mechanisms, laser grid, and timed security systems. Now their highest-rated experience.
caseStudies.description: Clockwork Escapes approached us to create their flagship room—a high-energy bank heist experience. We designed and built a complete bank vault environment with functional safe-cracking puzzles, a navigable laser grid, and escalating security challenges.
caseStudies.challenge: The client needed a room that could handle 15+ games per day while maintaining the tactile satisfaction of mechanical puzzles.
caseStudies.solution: We engineered all props for extreme durability, with hidden maintenance access points. The laser grid uses redundant sensors to ensure consistent gameplay.

caseStudies.title: The Haunted Library
caseStudies.outcome: A Victorian gothic library escape room integrated into a historic hotel, attracting both guests and day visitors.
caseStudies.description: A prestigious Edinburgh hotel wanted to add an escape room as a unique guest amenity. We designed a Victorian library that feels like a natural extension of the historic building, with hidden passages, moving bookcases, and atmospheric lighting.
caseStudies.challenge: The room needed to complement the hotel's historic character while meeting modern safety standards and accessibility requirements.
caseStudies.solution: We sourced period-appropriate materials and designed puzzles that could be solved by all ability levels. Hidden modern systems are completely invisible to players.

caseStudies.title: Into the Woods
caseStudies.outcome: An immersive forest set that transformed a warehouse venue into an enchanted woodland for a 4-week Fringe run.
caseStudies.description: Midnight Theatre needed a complete forest environment for their immersive adaptation. Working to a tight Fringe timeline, we created a modular set with 40+ trees, atmospheric lighting rigs, and interactive scenic elements.
caseStudies.challenge: Fringe timelines are brutal. We had 6 weeks from commission to load-in, with the venue only accessible 3 days before opening.
caseStudies.solution: We pre-built everything modularly in our workshop, with numbered assembly instructions. The entire set was installed in under 48 hours.

caseStudies.title: HMS Nautilus
caseStudies.outcome: A fully themed submarine interior with working periscope, torpedo loading bay, and flooding simulation.
caseStudies.description: Deep Dive Escapes wanted a nautical adventure that would set them apart in a competitive market. We created an authentic submarine environment with curved metal walls, functional naval equipment, and a dramatic flooding finale.
caseStudies.challenge: Creating the illusion of being underwater and the climactic 'flooding' sequence without actual water damage risk.
caseStudies.solution: We developed a lighting and sound system that simulates rising water levels, combined with strategic fog effects and pressure changes in the room.

caseStudies.title: Festival Gateway
caseStudies.outcome: A 6-metre illuminated gateway arch that became the festival's most photographed installation.
caseStudies.description: Connect Festival needed a striking entrance piece that would work day and night and withstand Scottish weather. We designed and built a sculptural gateway with integrated LED systems and weatherproof construction.
caseStudies.challenge: The installation needed to handle Edinburgh's unpredictable August weather while remaining visually striking in both daylight and darkness.
caseStudies.solution: Marine-grade materials, redundant lighting systems, and a modular design that allowed for quick setup and breakdown.

caseStudies.title: The Detective's Office
caseStudies.outcome: A 1940s noir detective office with hidden compartments, working phone puzzles, and authentic period props.
caseStudies.description: Mystery Rooms wanted a classic detective experience that would appeal to first-time escape room players. We created a warm, inviting environment packed with hidden secrets and intuitive puzzles.
caseStudies.challenge: Balancing authentic period aesthetics with modern gameplay expectations and accessibility needs.
caseStudies.solution: We combined genuine vintage pieces with custom-built props designed for durability, ensuring the room feels authentic while functioning reliably.
